blockingIssues.description: Sandbox capability subsets now constrain attached tools for unique inputs, but `SandboxAgentBuilder::capabilities()` still accepts duplicate capability entries and emits duplicate fixed-name tools, which trips the runner's duplicate-tool-name guard before subset-configured runs can execute.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented that this macOS mission environment provides `/usr/bin/sandbox-exec` for local sandbox shell and PTY confinement work.
